arts.ttl: Liverpool supporters will love what Cody Gakpo told Mohamed Salah as contract reminder sent
arts.sum: Cody Gakpo has pipped Mohamed Salah to win Liverpool's Player of the Month award

arts.ttl: David Moyes press conference went familiar route - but Everton manager's views on Liverpool remain
arts.sum: ECHO Everton reporter Chris Beesley reflects on David Moyes' pre-match press conference for Goodison Park's final Merseyside Derby

arts.ttl: Liverpool 18-year-old star's stunning effort inspires comeback days after debut but it's not enough
arts.sum: Liverpool Under-19s have been knocked out of the UEFA Youth League by VfB Stuttgart on penalties

arts.ttl: ‘Scary’: Yaya Toure says Liverpool have a player who genuinely frightens him
arts.sum: Yaya Toure isn’t a man who is easy to intimidate. Indeed, standing at 6 ft 3 being stronger than most other players in Premier League...

arts.ttl: Moyes wants to narrow 'gulf' between Everton and Liverpool
arts.sum: David Moyes says the gap between his Everton side and Liverpool is "as big as it has been for a long time" as the two sides to prepare for Wednesday's Merseyside derby at Goodison Park (19:30 GMT).

arts.ttl: Abdoulaye Doucoure hits out at Frank Lampard’s coaching at Everton: ‘We had a big argument’
arts.sum: Lampard and Doucoure fell out during the manager’s brief spell in charge of Everton

arts.ttl: EA FC 25 upgrade makes Mohamed Salah best in the world as Liverpool handed big boosts
arts.sum: EA Sports has handed Liverpool some big upgrades in the latest EA FC 25 squad update, including Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk, and Ibrahima Konate.

arts.ttl: 'I played for Everton under Frank Lampard and I was glad to see him sacked'
arts.sum: Frank Lampard lasted just one year as Everton manager, with one of the players who struggled for minutes under the Englishman going on to thrive under his successor

arts.ttl: 'I am convinced' - Carlo Ancelotti does not think Liverpool will win Champions League this season
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has overlooked Liverpool when choosing who he thinks will win this season's Champions League

arts.ttl: 'It's hard to say' - David Moyes makes Arne Slot admission amid Everton plan to close Liverpool gap
arts.sum: The Everton manager spoke to the media on Tuesday ahead of the Merseyside derby
